name: wxcode-admin-forge-mes
title: Forge Admin
description: Dark industrial-grade admin aesthetic: near-black canvas (#0c0f14), raised steel panels, molten-orange accent (#f97316), Inter type with tabular figures, and dense hairline-bordered tables. Archetype = entity-switcher navbar + icon rail + 4 KPI tiles + 2-column status board with an alerts side panel + full-width records table with status pills, plus matching list, form, and detail screens. Built for high-density operational consoles that read at a glance.

query.en: Apply this dark industrial admin aesthetic to my domain — near-black canvas, molten-orange accent, entity-switcher navbar, icon rail, 4 KPI tiles, a status board with an alerts side panel, and a dense records table with status pills, plus list / form / detail screens.
query.zh-CN: 将这个深色工业风格应用到我的领域：近黑底色、熔岩橙强调色、实体切换导航栏、图标侧栏、4 个 KPI 卡片、带告警侧栏的状态看板，以及带状态标签的密集记录表格，并配套列表 / 表单 / 详情页面。

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
